children.text: Subscribe to our newsletter for product updates, tips, and company news delivered straight to your inbox.

data.title: Task Management
data.description: Create, assign, and track tasks with powerful filters, custom fields, and multiple views including kanban, list, and timeline.

data.title: Real-time Sync
data.description: Changes propagate instantly across all connected devices. See teammate cursors, live edits, and get notified the moment something changes.

data.title: Workflow Automation
data.description: Build custom automations with our visual builder. Auto-assign tasks, move items between stages, and trigger notifications without code.

data.title: Team Docs
data.description: Write beautiful documents with real-time collaboration, embedded tasks, and version history. Everything your team knows, in one place.

data.title: Integrations
data.description: Connect with GitHub, Slack, Figma, Linear, and 100+ other tools. Two-way sync keeps everything up to date across your entire stack.

data.title: Analytics & Reports
data.description: Track velocity, burndown, and cycle time with built-in dashboards. Export to CSV or connect to your BI tools via API.

data.quote: Projectflow transformed how our engineering team works. We shipped 40% more features in Q3 after switching from our previous tool. The real-time collaboration alone is worth it.

We evaluated every project management tool on the market. Projectflow was the only one that didn't require us to change how we work — it adapted to us. Our designers and developers finally use the same tool.
The automation features saved us 15 hours per week on status updates and task routing alone. It's like having an extra team member who never sleeps and never forgets.

data.name: Free
data.description: Perfect for individuals and small teams getting started.
data.features:
Up to 5 team members
50 tasks per project
Basic views (list & kanban)
1 GB storage
Community support
7-day activity history

data.name: Pro
data.description: For growing teams that need more power and flexibility.
data.features:
Unlimited team members
Unlimited tasks
All views including timeline & calendar
100 GB storage
Workflow automation (50 rules)
Advanced analytics & reports
Priority email support
Custom fields & templates

data.name: Enterprise
data.description: For organizations that need advanced security and control.
data.features:
Everything in Pro
Unlimited storage
Unlimited automations
SSO & SAML authentication
Advanced permissions & audit log
Dedicated account manager
99.99% uptime SLA
Custom integrations & API access

data.question: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
data.answer: Yes! Every paid plan comes with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start. You can explore all Pro features and decide if it's right for your team before committing.

data.question: Can I migrate from another project management tool?
data.answer: Absolutely. We offer one-click importers for Jira, Asana, Trello, Monday, Linear, and Notion. For other tools, our CSV importer handles most formats. Our support team can also assist with custom migrations for Enterprise plans.

data.question: Is Projectflow suitable for large teams?
data.answer: Projectflow scales from solo founders to organizations with thousands of users. Our Enterprise plan includes advanced permissions, SSO, and dedicated infrastructure to ensure performance at any scale.

data.question: How secure is my data?
data.answer: We take security seriously. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256 and TLS 1.3. We're SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, and undergo regular third-party security audits. Enterprise plans include additional controls like IP allowlisting and custom data retention policies.

data.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
data.answer: Yes, you can cancel at any time from your account settings. When you cancel, you'll retain access until the end of your current billing period. We also offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied.

children.text: Projectflow was founded in 2024 with a simple mission: make project management feel effortless. We believe that the best tools get out of your way and let you focus on the work that matters.
Our Story

After years of building products at fast-growing startups, our founding team experienced firsthand how broken project management tools could slow down even the most talented teams. We set out to build something better — a tool that combines the power of enterprise software with the simplicity of a great consumer product.
Our Values
Speed matters.
Everything in Projectflow is optimized for performance. From sub-50ms page loads to instant real-time sync, we obsess over every millisecond.
Simplicity wins.
We'd rather remove a feature than add complexity. Every interaction should feel intuitive, even for first-time users.
Teams first.
Collaboration isn't an afterthought — it's the foundation. We build for teams, not individuals working in silos.
Last updated: January 1, 2025
At Projectflow, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.
Information We Collect
We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, use our services, or contact us for support. This may include your name, email address, and usage data.
How We Use Your Information
We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to communicate with you, and to comply with legal obligations.
Contact Us
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@projectflow.app.
Last updated: January 1, 2025
These Terms of Service govern your use of Projectflow. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms.
Use of Service

Accounts
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
Limitation of Liability
